name: whichmodel
description: Cost-optimized LLM model recommendations for AI agents. Get real-time pricing across 100+ models and find the cheapest model for any task.

tools.name: recommend_model
tools.description: Get a cost-optimised model recommendation for a specific task type, complexity, and budget.

tools.name: compare_models
tools.description: Head-to-head comparison of 2-5 models with optional volume cost projections.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Raw pricing data lookup with filters by model, provider, price, and capabilities.

tools.name: check_price_changes
tools.description: See what model pricing has changed since a given date.
